title: Pocket Computer Reversi
notes: Reversi (リバーシ, Ribāshi) is a digital adaptation of the classic board game also known as Othello. Players take turns placing black or white discs on the board, flipping their opponent’s pieces by trapping them between their own. Victory goes to the player with the most discs of their color when the board is full. Reversi on the Game Pocket Computer preserves the strategic gameplay of the original, offering a competitive and cerebral experience for portable play.

title: Soukoban
notes: Soko-Ban (倉庫番, Sōko-ban – “Warehouse Keeper”) is a warehouse-themed puzzle game where players control a worker tasked with pushing crates onto designated storage spots. The challenge lies in carefully planning moves, as crates can only be pushed—not pulled—and getting one stuck means starting over. Known for its clever design and deceptively simple rules, Sōko-ban delivers a mentally stimulating experience that rewards foresight and precision.

images.screenshot: Images/Epoch Game Pocket Computer/Screenshot - Game Title/Soukoban (Japan).png

title: Pocket Computer Mahjong
notes: Mahjongg (マージャン, Mājan) brings the traditional Chinese tile-based game to the Epoch Game Pocket Computer, offering a strategic and engaging experience. Players aim to complete winning hands by forming sets and pairs while drawing and discarding tiles. This version faithfully captures the core mechanics of Mahjong, allowing both seasoned players and newcomers to enjoy the depth of the classic game in a portable format.

title: Asutorobonbā
notes: Astro Bomber (アストロボンバー, Asutorobonbā) is a vertically scrolling shooter where players pilot a spacecraft and drop bombs on enemy bases while dodging incoming fire. Timing and precision are key, as players must eliminate targets from above before they are overwhelmed. With simple controls and arcade-style action, Astro Bomber delivers a compact but challenging shooting experience on the go.

title: Burokkumeizu
notes: Block Maze (ブロックメイズ, Burokkumeizu) is a puzzle game that tasks players with navigating a maze filled with movable blocks. Players must figure out the correct path by pushing blocks to clear obstacles and create new routes. As levels increase in complexity, strategic thinking and planning ahead become essential. Block Maze offers cerebral fun with a focus on spatial reasoning and problem-solving.
